design_plan: rng=42; hero_math=1120px/2.5lines; AIDA=pass; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; labels_checked; button_contrast=pass
headline: Text message AI assistant that actually gets work done

site_brief.audience: people who want to text an AI assistant instead of opening another app
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Text message AI assistant', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
site_brief.title: Text message AI assistant
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super turns SMS-style requests into real computer actions, follow-ups, reminders, and app workflows

summary: An indexable use‑case page showing how Super lets you text an AI assistant that can operate a real computer, follow up across apps, and reuse a computer-use cache for faster, cheaper repeat workflows — without opening another app.
